license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rprd5m6
title: Sandwich KIRA-ELISA Protocol
author: Umed T Boltaev

steps_raw.instruction: Dilute unlabeled capture antibody to a final concentration of 0.5 – 8 µg/ml in PBS and transfer 100 µl to each well of a high affinity, protein-binding ELISA plates (e.g., NUNC Immulon 4 HBX). Prepare 2 plates: ' pY Plate ' and ' Total Protein '. Use Sino Ab for pY plate (1/1000 dilution), R&D Ab for total protein plate (1/500 dilution). undetermined, per well undetermined, per plate Anti-TrkB Antibody Sino Biological Catalog #10047-RP02 TrkB Goat anti-Human, Polyclonal, R&D Systems™ Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AF397
Seal plate to prevent evaporation. Incubate at 4°C overnight, or 2-3h at RT.
Bring the plate to room temperature, flick off the capture antibody solution.
Seal plate and incubate at room temperature for ≥ 1 hour. 01:00:00
Firmly blot plate against clean paper towels.
Transfer lysate from experimental plate (where cells were treated). undetermined, per well for pY plate undetermined, per well for total protein (receptor) plate
Seal the plate and incubate at room temperature at 4°C overnight.

Wash with PBS/Tween (5x). Washes can be effectively accomplished by filling wells with either a squirt bottle, carboy, manifold dispenser, multi-channel pipettor or automatic plate washer. For increased stringency, after each wash, let the plate stand briefly, flick off the buffer, and blot plates on paper towels before refilling. Perform at least 3 washes.

Dilute the detection antibody to 0.25 – 2 µg/ml in Blocking Solution. Add 100 µl of diluted antibody to each well. For pY plate: prepare 1/2500 dilution (4 ul of Ab stock to 10 ml of 1% BSA PBS/Tween). For primary cultures, reduce the dilution to 1/1250 (8 ul of Ab stock to 10 ml of 1% BSA PBS/Tween). For total protein (receptor) plate: prepare working dilution of detecting Ab. Capturing Ab and detecting Ab MUST be from different host animals.
SIncubate at room temperature for 1 hour. 01:00:00
Wash with PBS/Tween (5x). Perform at least 3 washes.

Dilute the Av-HRP conjugate (Cat. No. 405103) or other enzyme conjugate to its pre-determined optimal concentration in Blocking Buffer (usually between 1/500 – 1/2000). Add 100 µl per well. Anti-rabbit IgG, HRP-linked Antibody Cell Signaling Technology Catalog ##7074
Seal the plate and incubate at room temperature for 30 minutes. 00:30:00
Wash with PBS/Tween (5x). Perform at least 5 washes.
Add TMB One solution and incubate for 30 min at RT TMB One Solution, 100ml Promega Catalog #G7431 00:30:00, pY plate color development undetermined, per well
Add 1N HCl solution undetermined, per well
Read the optical density (OD) for each well with a microplate reader set to 405 nm.
Wash with PBS/Tween (5x). undetermined, per well
Wash with PBS/Tween (5x).
Add 1% BSA PBS solution. undetermined, per well
Add TMB One solution and incubate for 5-30 min at RT TMB One Solution, 100ml Promega Catalog #G7431 undetermined, per well
Add 1N HCl solution undetermined, per well
Read the optical density (OD) for each well with a microplate reader set to 405 nm.
